name: What kind of content does AI search usually pick up and cite?
description: AI systems usually prefer direct answers, clear language, factual support, and structured pages. FAQ-style content with current information is easier to cite.

mainEntity.name: What kind of content does AI search usually pick up and cite?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI systems tend to favor content that answers a specific question directly, uses plain language, and contains factual details they can trust. Structured pages with clear headings, FAQs, and up-to-date information are easier for these systems to interpret.
acceptedAnswer.description: AI systems usually prefer direct answers, clear language, factual support, and structured pages. FAQ-style content with current information is easier to cite.
